Package simulation

Class KnowledgeBase

java.lang.Object
simulation.KnowledgeBase
public final class KnowledgeBase extends Object
Per-UAV accumulator of sensor-node knowledge.

The KnowledgeBase records every sensor node that the UAV has directly detected (within its own detection range) or indirectly discovered (via neighbour caches transferred from detected nodes). It keeps the most recent position snapshot for each known node, de-duplicating by node ID.

Bug E fix — no static state

The legacy Nodes.Node class held two static ArrayList fields for drone caches, meaning every node instance shared a single list. The KnowledgeBase is an instance owned by one specific UAV; it has no static fields and never leaks state across UAV instances.

Snapshot contract

Calling snapshot() returns an ordered, unmodifiable List<SensorNode> safe to pass to the algorithm layer. The list reflects positions at the time of last observation and is not affected by subsequent movement of sensor nodes. A fresh snapshot should be taken immediately before each path-planning invocation.

  • Constructor Details

    • KnowledgeBase

      public KnowledgeBase()
      Constructs an empty knowledge base.

  • Method Details

    • observe

      public void observe(SensorNode snapshot)
      Records a direct observation of a sensor node.

      If the node has been seen before, its position snapshot is updated to reflect its current location. If the node is new, it is appended to the discovery record (insertion order is preserved).

      Parameters:
      snapshot - immutable position snapshot of the observed node

    • observe

      public void observe(NodeAgent agent)
      Records a direct observation from a live NodeAgent.

      Convenience overload that converts the agent to a snapshot before storing.

      Parameters:
      agent - the observed node agent; must not be null

    • observeWithTransitiveCache

      public void observeWithTransitiveCache(List<NodeAgent> agents, Map<Integer,NodeAgent> agentIndex)
      Records direct observations for a batch of agents and, for each, also ingests the agent's neighbour cache (transitive discovery).

      This implements the same effect as the original code's "direct caching with node caching" mode: when the UAV detects a node, it also learns about the nodes that node has previously encountered.

      Parameters:
      agents - agents directly detected by the UAV
      agentIndex - a map from node ID to NodeAgent used to look up neighbours (pass Environment.agentById())

    • knows

      public boolean knows(int nodeId)
      Returns true if the node with the given ID has been observed.
      Parameters:
      nodeId - node ID to check
      Returns:
      true if the node is known

    • size

      public int size()
      Returns the number of distinct nodes currently in the knowledge base.
      Returns:
      known-node count

    • snapshot

      public List<SensorNode> snapshot()
      Returns an ordered, unmodifiable snapshot of all known nodes, suitable for passing to the algorithm layer.

      The ordering is discovery order (the order in which nodes were first added to the knowledge base). Position data reflects the most recent observation of each node.

      Returns:
      unmodifiable list of known SensorNode snapshots

    • clear

      public void clear()
      Clears all accumulated knowledge. Used when the UAV resets between experimental runs.

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
